findings.title: Unsafe Pickle Deserialization of Workflow Import
findings.description: User-supplied base64-encoded payload deserialized with pickle.loads() enabling arbitrary code execution

findings.title: Unsafe YAML Deserialization with yaml.Loader
findings.description: YAML workflow import uses yaml.load() with unsafe yaml.Loader enabling arbitrary Python object instantiation

findings.title: Pickle Deserialization in Cache Retrieval
findings.description: Cache retrieval endpoint deserializes stored data with pickle.loads() which can execute arbitrary code if cache contents are tampered with

findings.title: Unsafe YAML Configuration Loading
findings.description: Configuration endpoint parses user-supplied YAML with yaml.load() using unsafe yaml.Loader

findings.title: Remote Code Loading via Extension URL
findings.description: Extension endpoint fetches code from user-supplied URL and executes it with exec(compile()) enabling remote code execution

findings.title: Untrusted Plugin Download and Import
findings.description: Plugin install endpoint downloads Python code from untrusted URL and imports it via importlib without integrity verification
